s: Secure offline To-Do & Notes with biometric lock.
d:
✨ A simple, private space for your tasks and thoughts.

A clean, straightforward tool for managing your daily tasks and capturing your notes, designed to stay entirely on your device. 📱

✅ Everything in One Place
Keep your life organized without switching between apps. Whether you’re checking off a quick grocery list or writing down ideas, everything is right where you need it. 📝

🛡️ Privacy First
Your data never leaves your phone. With built-in biometric locking, you can keep your personal thoughts and important lists safe from prying eyes using your fingerprint or face unlock. 🔒

🔇 No Distractions
No ads, no tracking, and no internet required. It’s just a reliable, fast, and quiet place to organize your life. 🎯
